programs.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep
programs.desc: MyMagnesiumTM ProClinical delivers 350 mg of highly absorbable magnesium plus clinically studied Shoden® Ashwagandha, vitamin D, Zinc, Boron, and antioxidant-rich organic blueberries—designed to support calm focus, steady energy, and deeper sleep.

programs.title: Joni Table Talk
programs.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programs.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programs.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Dawn met Carey while working on the West Coast where they started their family; now that Carey has retired, Dawn has convinced him to move back home with her to the East Coast; Carey's only requirement is to live by the ocean.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is a wonderful day; after experiencing a health scare, they realize it is time to pursue their passions full-time.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
